name: Capital One Journey Student Credit Card

earning_rates.notes: 1% cash back on all purchases + 0.25% bonus when you pay on time = 1.25% total

other_benefits: Access to CreditWise® credit monitoring tool

sources.notes: Capital One official student card page
Capital One official student card page

notes: Basic student credit card with modest 1.25% total cash back (1% + 0.25% bonus for on-time payments). No sign-up bonus. No annual fee. APR is high at 29.99% variable. The 0.25% extra when paying on time incentivizes good habits. Limited to students or those with limited credit. No travel or purchase protections. Consider SavorOne Student for better earning rates.
deprecated_reason: Subprime / secured / student card. Different user segment from OpenCard's rewards/credits-maximizer focus. Excluded from main listings.
